source: Modulo opzionale. 4 carte identiche nel fronte (una per potenza, distinte dal retro). Trascritto da game/assets/cards/country/country_000.jpg (EU).
note: A inizio partita ogni giocatore riceve la sua Executive Order. Una volta per partita, invece di giocare una carta, la si mette a faccia in giu' ed esegue una delle azioni elencate. A fine partita, se non usata, +3 VP.
actions: Improve Relations with a Country on the board.
Gain 1 Army. Then, Move up to 2 Armies.
Build a Base in an allied Country.
effect_text: Once per game, instead of playing a card from your hand, place a card face down in front of you and perform one of the following actions: Improve Relations with a Country on the board; Engage in a Region; Trade; Invest in an allied Country; Gain 1 Army, then Move up to 2 Armies; Build a Base in an allied Country; Get a Growth card; Produce 3 Resource types. GAME END: If unused, gain 3 VP.
